CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Omnibus Insular Areas Act of 1992, and not as part of the Robert T. Stafford Disaster Relief and Emergency Assistance Act which comprises this chapter.

Termination of Trust Territory of the Pacific IslandsFor termination of Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands, see note set out preceding , Territories and Insular Possessions.section 1681 of Title 48

children.text: the term “insular area” means any of the following: American Samoa, the Federated States of Micronesia, Guam, the Marshall Islands, the Northern Mariana Islands, the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands, and the Virgin Islands;
the term “disaster” means a declaration of a major disaster by the President after , pursuant to ; andSeptember 1, 1989section 5170 of this title
the term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.
